results.title: DOJ says it's no longer illegal to download TikTok on federal devices
results.description: The Justice Department determined this week a federal law banning TikTok from government devices no longer applies to the social video app.

results.title: DOJ says it's no longer illegal to download TikTok on federal devices - CBS News
